title: Entity-density cache has no explicit upper-bound size guard

reason: All routingReasons values are hardcoded strings, ArtifactClass enum (9 values), ChannelName enum (5 values), or classifier-derived metadata. Raw user query never interpolated. Traced from routeQuery → buildRoutingQueryPlan → SearchDecisionEnvelope.queryPlan → decision-audit.ts.
All entity-density functions are fully synchronous. Node.js single-threaded event loop prevents interleaving. No async/await, Promise, or yield points in refreshIfStale or getEntityDensityScore.
routeQuery is fully synchronous. isComplexityRouterEnabled() at L268 and isGraphChannelPreservationEnabled() at L325 execute in same call stack. No yield point between them.
Regex /\b(audit|security|...)\b/ is a simple alternation with word boundaries. Zero nested quantifiers, no (a+)+ patterns, structurally immune to catastrophic backtracking.

direction: DoS via snapshot allocation / ring buffer overflow
reason: getSnapshot called only from infrequent memory_health handler (not hot path). Ring buffer bounded to 200. No new DoS finding beyond prior P2-002 and new S7-001.
